international_news.summary: **40** people drowned in **France** as the nation sought relief from a record heatwave in **western Europe**. Temperatures hit record levels, with **Europe** identified as the world's fastest-warming continent, and a

The **EU** hosted **Taliban** officials for the first time in **Brussels** to discuss deportations and consular access in **Europe**. **Belgium** issued visas for the delegation, a move that faced fierce criticism.

**Russia** is pressuring **Belarus** to open a new front in the **Ukraine War**. The **Belarusian** opposition warns **Lukashenko** is aligning to join **Russia's** war, raising concerns about the **Belarusian** army's size and threat to **Ukraine's** northern sector.

**Donald Trump's America** received overwhelmingly negative international reviews, with fewer nations, including **Canada**, viewing the **U.S.** as a reliable partner. A **Pew Research Center** global survey indicated plummeting approval ratings, even among far-right groups.

The **PM** will proceed with a controversial defense plan despite a resignation. **Keir Starmer** risks a clash with **Andy Burnham** over defense funding, a move some suggest could embarrass **Britain** before **NATO**.

The **Albanian PM** stated, “I’m not the Godfather,” amidst growing protests against a luxury real estate deal linked to **Jared Kushner** and **Ivanka Trump**. Protesters chanted “Albania is not for sale,” directing anger at the government.

**10** years after the **Brexit** vote, a majority of **Britons** now believe leaving the **European Union** was a mistake. Analysts suggest **Brexit** has cost the **UK** growth, leading to an unruly political landscape.

**Russia** is considering a diesel export ban and fuel imports due to **Ukrainian** strikes on refineries, leading to spreading fuel shortages. **Crimea** has restricted public life, and small planes are testing car fuel as aviation supplies tighten.
**Andy Burnham** is preparing for a **UK Labour** leadership contest, which some observers anticipate as a

A **UN** inquiry found **Israel** continues to commit genocide by deliberately targeting children in **Gaza**. Investigators stated that **Palestinian** children are being targeted in a “continuing genocide.”

domestic_news.summary: A devastating building fire in **Lucknow** brought the development authority’s actions under scrutiny. **Four** accused were sent to **14-day** judicial custody, the building faces a fresh demolition notice, and a crackdown on illegal coaching centers is underway.

**Pune** realtor **Ketan Agrawal** was allegedly lured to **Lohagad Fort** and pushed **400-ft** by his fiancée, **Siya Goyal**, and her lover. Both have been arrested after his family initially disbelieved the accident claim.

**CM Vijay** brought cinematic flair to the **TN assembly**, concluding his speech with a dramatic gesture. He affirmed the **TVK** government's clear stance on political opposition to and administrative cooperation with the **Centre**, stating ideological opposition to the **BJP**.

The **US** authorized **Iranian** oil sales and temporarily lifted major sanctions amid talks for a final peace deal, allowing the sale of crude oil and petrochemical products. **Donald Trump** warned he would “do what I have to do” if **Tehran** falters.

**Gurgaon police** claim **Punjab** officers paid **Rs 10 lakh** to tailor a forensic report on a video clip **CM Mann** called fake. **Two** individuals were arrested in **Gurugram** for forged reports in the **Bhagwant Mann** video row.
**Gaurav Gogoi** and **Priyank Kharge** are among **28** leaders scheduled to address 'Chhatron Ki Goonj' press conferences across **India**.
**CUET-UG 2026** results are out, with one candidate, **Devina** (daughter of former **Delhi Minister Kailash Gahlot**), scoring a **100** percentile in **four** of **five** subjects.
**Japan PM Sanai Takaichi's** visit to **Assam** next month has been cancelled. **New Delhi** will now host the **India-Japan summit** from **July 1-3**.

The **Supreme Court** directed a petitioner to approach the **Calcutta High Court** regarding a plea against the **West Bengal** government's move to deny ration to individuals excluded from the **SIR** (State-level Identification Register).

business_news.summary: Tech stocks, including **Nvidia**, **Micron**, and **AMD**, tumbled for a second day, leading to a **Nasdaq** drop of over **2%**. The sell-off was attributed to the **AI** trade cooling and spreading bubble worries from **Asia**.

**FedEx (NYSE:FDX)** posted strong earnings in its last quarter, with sales beating estimates and revenue rising due to growth in package yields and volume. The company anticipates profit growth this year.
The **US** announced **$17.5 billion** in loans for the nuclear power supply chain, aiming to speed up the deployment of **10** new large nuclear reactors.

The **US Treasury** further dismantled overseas scam operations, adding sanctions against **Cambodian Prince Group** and targeting **Huione** workaround and **H-Pay** in a crypto scam crackdown, linked to the largest **Bitcoin** seizure in **DOJ** history.
**Alan Greenspan**, former head of the **Federal Reserve** and described as the
**Alphabet** was added to the **Dow Jones Industrial Average**, replacing **Verizon**. This makes **Alphabet** the **fifth Magnificent Seven** stock to join the blue-chip index.
**SpaceX** launched a **$25 billion** notes offering, following an **$86 billion** IPO. Some analysts expressed skepticism regarding the high-grade debt.
**Amazon Prime Day 2026** deals are live, offering discounts up to **60%** on products from brands like **Adidas** and **Sony**.
**Dairy Queen** is launching **3** first-of-their-kind **Blizzards** and a patriotic slush float for a limited time.
**SpaceX** stock dipped below its **$150** debut price before rebounding, snapping a **three-day** losing streak after its blockbuster IPO.

technology_news.summary: **Prime Day** deals are officially live, offering up to **54%** off tech sales from brands like **Apple**, **Sony**, **Bose**, and **Anker**, including discounts on **AirPods**.
Analysts reacted to the **$1,000+ Steam Machine** price reveal, calling it a

**AirPods Max 2** are receiving **iOS 27** upgrades, with **Apple** releasing new beta firmware, including the first build for **AirPods Max 2**, and updates for **AirPods Pro 3** and **Beats Studio Buds**.
**Prime Day** offers **$2,000** off **100-inch Hisense TVs**, among other significant deals on **4K TVs**.

**Prime Day** smartphone deals are live, with savings up to **44%** on **Samsung Foldables**, **Pixels**, and **Motorolas**, including record-low prices on **Samsung Galaxy** and **Google Pixel** models.
Owners report the biggest problem with foldable phones.
**Dbrand** opened preorders for a **Portal-themed Companion Cube Case** for **Valve's** unreleased **Steam Machine**, which arrives next month with a matching **Steam Controller** skin.
**Prime Day** offers discounts on desktop **PCs** from **Dell**, **HP**, **Lenovo**, and other brands, alongside deals on laptops and gaming equipment like **Switch 2** bundles.
The **MSI Claw 8 EX AI+** launched for **$1,800**, with **MSI** acknowledging a
**iOS 27** will add inline replies and photo reactions to **Android-iPhone RCS** messaging, bringing more **iMessage** features to

sports_news.summary: **Gary Parrish's** final **2026 NBA Mock Draft** projections followed the **Giannis Antetokounmpo** blockbuster trade, with the **Washington Wizards** holding the first pick.
The **Timberwolves** traded **Julius Randle** and the **No. 28** pick in the **NBA Draft** to the **Nets** for the **33rd** pick, also re-signing **Ayo Dosunmu**. **Claxton** went to the **Bulls**.
The **Golden Boot Race** is underway, with **Lionel Messi** ascending to the top spot of all-time **World Cup** goals, and **Kylian Mbappé** close behind.
**Giannis Antetokounmpo** was traded to the **Miami Heat**, a move anticipated by **Serena Williams'** husband, **Alexis Ohanian**, **401** days prior. The **Bucks** must now plan their future.
**Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo** ended his goal drought, scoring **2** goals and becoming the first player to score at **6 World Cups**, answering critics.

The **Zurich Classic's** PGA status is in jeopardy after the **PGA Tour** approved a two-tiered system for **2028**. **Tiger Woods** made his first public appearance since rehab to introduce sweeping changes.
**England** and **Ghana** played to a goalless draw in the **2026 FIFA World Cup**, frustrating **England's** bid for round of **32** qualification.
**Jeffrey Kessler** argued that the exclusion of **Brendan Sorsby** from the **2026** supplemental draft violates the **CBA**, as the **NFL** informed teams it would not hold the draft.
Olympic skier **Bode Miller** was arrested on drug charges in **Idaho** and pleaded not guilty.
**John Beilein** expressed shock over **Dusty May** leaving **Michigan** for the **Dallas Mavericks** head coach position, a move **May** made in **June**.

user_interest.summary: **Netflix** unveiled first looks at 'One Piece' anime and 'Blue Eye Samurai' Season **2** at the **Annecy Showcase**.
Fans speculate that **Wes Bennett** from 'Better Than The Movies' has been cast.
A 'Fool Night' anime adaptation was announced as a collaboration between **Sunrise** and **SHAFT**.
**Na Hong-Jin** will receive the **Action Cinema Award** at **NYAFF**, which will also feature the North American premiere of 'Hope'.
**Netflix** unveiled its upcoming anime slate at the **Annecy Festival**.
**2026** premiere dates for new and returning series on broadcast, streaming, and cable were announced.
**Netflix** unveiled 'Fool Night' and more of 'The One Piece' at **Annecy**, as its anime viewership skyrockets.
**Tom Cruise** celebrated **46** years in movies with a retrospective trailer and new
**Netflix** unveiled first images of 'Fool Night', its new anime series.
A **4K** restoration trailer for the **Charlton Heston** sci-fi classic 'Soylent Green' was released.
**Netflix** acquired an anime adaptation of 'Fool Night', a dystopian manga.
Tuesday's watch list includes the 'Not Suitable For Work' finale and the **NBA Draft**.
**Netflix** united **2** iconic anime studios for an intriguing sci-fi show in **2026**.
**Summer Kids Fest** offers free movies at **Premiere Cinemas** in **South Plains Mall**.
**Netflix** unveiled a new anime slate, including 'The One Piece' and 'Blue Eye Samurai' Season **2**.

weather.summary: Good morning, Delhi! Residents of **Connaught Place** are waking up to a warm day, with temperatures currently at **34.91°C**. The skies feature **scattered clouds**, offering some visual interest, while humidity levels remain at **31%**. Stay hydrated as the day progresses!

finance.overview: The market closed on a positive note, with all major indices showing gains. The **NIFTY 50** climbed by **+0.37%** to reach **24102.90**, while the **BSE SENSEX** saw a similar rise of **+0.38%**, closing at **77094.07**. Banking stocks also performed well, with the **NIFTY BANK** advancing by **+0.43%** to **57935.60**. On our watchlist, **INFY.NS** and **RELIANCE.NS** led the charge, both up by **+1.33%** and **+1.30%** respectively. **HDFCBANK.NS** also contributed positively, gaining **+0.85%**, while **ICICIBANK.NS** and **TCS.NS** posted more modest but still positive returns of **+0.44%** and **+0.13%** respectively. Overall, a day of broad-based gains for investors.
